rules:
Welcome to A Tacos Lobby!
If you’re here, chill and Take 5 ❤️ 18+ ONLY. Security’s will check. Let’s vibe!
1. Leave Drama at the Door
We’re all adults. Keep the chaos out. No nonsense, period.
2. Respect Everyone
No hate, no racism,s no discrimination. We’re all about good vibes and diversity. Be kind or be gone. Also not allowed to break vrchat terms of service (example don't be nude).
3. Mic Manners
DJ’s spinning? Don’t blast music through your mic. Use your head, keep it chill.
4. Respect Mods & Staff
No trolling or flaming. They’re keeping the party smooth, so don’t mess with ’em.
5. No Crashing or Hacking
Try to crash the lobby? Instant ban and blacklist. Don’t test us.

In Taco Resolves Words… Take 20 and keep it cool!

👁‍ Zentaka is watching 👁 ‍
